_comment: MCP manifest. The installer (INSTALL.md, Phase 4) reads this and registers each server into the target project's opencode.json `mcp` block. Rules: never invent secrets (use {env:VAR} placeholders + .env.example); skip servers already configured; do not install servers marked on_demand until the project actually needs them (they are synthesized later via the mcp-synth skill).

servers.name: playwright
servers.purpose: Headless browser for visual/perceptual verification (screenshots that back [human] tasks). Synthesize when the front-end arrives.

servers.name: context7
servers.purpose: Up-to-date library/API documentation lookup. Enable if the project leans on fast-moving third-party libraries.

servers.name: _example_remote_with_auth
servers.purpose: Template entry showing the credential pattern. Copy, rename, and enable for a real service. Do NOT enable this placeholder.

credentials.description: API token for the example service. Add the real value to .env (never commit it).
